overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk-style Japanese garden at night during heavy rain. The video begins under a covered urban entrance with neon lighting and security barriers, then transitions into an open zen garden featuring stone pagodas, palm trees, and atmospheric lighting. The footage displays high-quality game engine rendering with ray-traced reflections and cinematic post-processing typical of Cyberpunk 2077.

events.description: exits covered structure into open garden area exposed to rain

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the covered entrance toward the garden exit

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking away from camera along the left wall

entered.detail: large overhanging metal roof with linear fluorescent lighting
black and yellow striped barrier arm blocking vehicle access
red illuminated sign reading NO ENTRY mounted on the barrier

purple neon light strip on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered urban entrance with artificial lighting. The camera moves forward past a security barrier with a red NO ENTRY sign, flanked by a wooden slat wall on the right and neon lighting on the left. The environment is sheltered from the rain with wet asphalt underfoot.

scene_state.functional_zone: Japanese zen garden entrance with palm trees

events.description: transitions from artificial overhead lighting to ambient garden lighting with rain exposure
encounters pedestrian walking through the garden path

agents.ego_description: walking along the gravel path into the garden, observing the illuminated landscaping

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt and beige pants walking through the garden rain

entered.detail: tall palm trees with fronds illuminated by warm uplighting
wet gravel pathway reflecting the ambient garden lights
square light fixtures embedded in the ground emitting warm glow
volumetric fog and heavy rain effects throughout the garden
rectangular stone basin with water and illuminated edges

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered structure, the scene opens into a rain-soaked Japanese garden with mixed ambient lighting. The camera walks along a gravel path lined with illuminated ground cubes and palm trees. A pedestrian in light clothing walks past in the opposite direction as the environment becomes fully exposed to the heavy rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional Japanese garden with stone pagodas

events.description: passes traditional stone pagoda lantern on the right side of path

agents.ego_description: wandering through the garden path observing stone lanterns and water features

entered.detail: traditional multi-tiered Japanese stone lantern with golden ornament
dense bamboo plantings with atmospheric lighting
massive central boulder surrounded by accent lighting

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the garden, the path winds past a traditional stone pagoda lantern and water basins. The vegetation becomes denser with bamboo groves visible to the left. The camera approaches a large rock formation at the garden's center while rain continues to fall through the atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: central garden area with large rock feature

events.description: slows pace while circling the large central rock formation

agents.ego_description: approaching and circling the large rock formation at the garden's center

entered.detail: low wooden fence surrounding the central rock feature
small traditional structure with curved roof in the background

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on the central garden area dominated by a massive rock formation encircled by a wooden railing. The camera moves around this feature, passing additional stone lanterns and illuminated ground fixtures. The garden extends into the misty distance with traditional architectural elements visible through the rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, neon-lit urban entrance into the heart of a rain-drenched cyberpunk Japanese garden. It begins under a covered walkway, moving past a security barrier and a red no-entry sign along wet asphalt. As the camera exits the structure, the scene opens into the heavy rain, following a gravel path lined with illuminated ground cubes and palm trees while a pedestrian passes by. The path then winds deeper into the garden, shifting past traditional stone pagoda lanterns and dense bamboo groves before approaching a central rock formation. Finally, the camera circles this massive rock and its wooden railing, passing further lanterns as the garden extends into a misty, rain-filled distance.
